case_title: WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. VS. SHELBY J DEPEW

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR FEB-25-2020 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT DEPEW, SHELBY J SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-30-2019
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR FEB-25-2020 CONTINUED TO MAY-12-2020 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF MAY-12-2020 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
